text: Training signal: The card was ordered but has not reached my address.
label: card_arrival

text: Example for routing: The promised delivery date passed and the card is still missing.
label: card_arrival

text: Observed user wording: I need help locating the card shipment.
label: card_arrival

text: Training signal: The transfer is still processing in the app.
label: pending_transfer

text: Example for routing: The money I sent has no final status yet.
label: pending_transfer

text: Observed user wording: This is not a card payment; a bank transfer remains pending.
label: pending_transfer

text: Training signal: I need to upload documents to verify who I am.
label: verify_my_identity

text: Example for routing: The app blocks me until I complete identity verification.
label: verify_my_identity

text: Observed user wording: Where do I finish the identity check?
label: verify_my_identity

text: Training signal: I want to start a refund for this purchase.
label: request_refund

text: Example for routing: Please help me get money back for an order.
label: request_refund

text: Observed user wording: I have not requested a refund yet and need to begin.
label: request_refund

text: Training signal: The merchant says the refund was issued but I cannot see it.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: Example for routing: I returned the item and the refund is missing from my balance.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: Observed user wording: This is not about starting a refund; the credit should already show.
label: Refund_not_showing_up

text: Training signal: My card was rejected at checkout.
label: declined_card_payment

text: Example for routing: The shop terminal declined the card purchase.
label: declined_card_payment

text: Observed user wording: The merchant says the card payment failed.
label: declined_card_payment

text: Training signal: My wallet was stolen and the physical card must be frozen.
label: lost_or_stolen_card

text: Example for routing: The card is missing after my bag was taken.
label: lost_or_stolen_card

text: Observed user wording: I lost my card and need to block it.
label: lost_or_stolen_card

text: Training signal: There is a card charge from a merchant I do not know.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: Example for routing: A completed card payment appears that nobody here made.
label: card_payment_not_recognised

text: Observed user wording: The card transaction cleared but I cannot identify it.
label: card_payment_not_recognised
